description_long: This object consists of a group of perfume bottles and diffusers, each paired with a matching rectangular box. The bottles are cylindrical and come in pastel shades of turquoise, pink, and light blue, with some featuring thin wooden sticks protruding from their tops, indicating they are reed diffusers. The boxes are tall, rectangular, and colored in muted tones that complement the bottles. The bottles have smooth, glossy surfaces and are topped with either flat or slightly domed caps, some of which are removable. The overall arrangement is symmetrical, with the bottles and boxes forming a visually balanced display. No visible brand logos or intricate decorative elements are present, giving the set a clean, modern aesthetic.
description: A group of pastel-colored cylindrical perfume bottles and reed diffusers, each paired with a matching rectangular box, arranged in a balanced, modern display.
description_view_0: Front view showing all bottles and boxes, with reed sticks clearly visible and the color variety most apparent.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the arrangement and the relative heights of the boxes and bottles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the boxes and bottles, with fewer visible details and no reed sticks facing forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pink and turquoise bottles, with the boxes partially obscuring some bottles.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle caps are flat or slightly domed, matching the color of their respective bottles, and appear to be made of plastic. They are smooth, glossy, and likely removable, with no visible decorative features or mechanisms.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottles have a simple cylindrical silhouette with straight sides and a flat base, topped with a flat or slightly domed cap. The overall outline is symmetrical and clean.
attribute_decorative_elements: The only decorative elements are the pastel colors of the bottles and the presence of reed sticks in some bottles, which add a natural, minimalist touch.
